title: Mizzou team discovers what makes all-female fish species a scientific ‘miracle’
summary_en: Amazon molly fish reproduce asexually yet somehow avoid the genetic mutations that could lead to extinction. Researchers are discovering why.
title_cn: 密苏里大学团队探明全雌性鱼类成为科学界“奇迹”的原因

title: Alpha-gal syndrome changes how we socialize
summary_en: Red meat allergy can be triggered by cross-contaminated products, making dining out difficult.
title_cn: 阿尔法-半乳糖综合征改变我们的社交方式

title: Adventure Club extends learning beyond the classroom for Columbia and Mizzou
summary_en: Program serves area school children while preparing the next generation of educators
title_cn: 冒险俱乐部为哥伦比亚市及密苏里大学拓展课堂外延伸学习

title: Eichman credits Mizzou's Springfield Clinical Campus for residency at pediatric unit
summary_en: More than 99% of the School of Medicine's class of 2026 received a residency program match during ‘Match Day.'
title_cn: 艾克曼将其获得儿科住院医师资格归功于密苏里大学斯普林菲尔德临床校区
